NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ROBERTO BARRERA RAMOS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF LILIANA RANGEL TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST OF PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. ONE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE HER RESPONSE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. SUCH RESPONSE WILL BE WITHOUT OBJECTIONS EXCEPT FOR ANY APPROPRIATE OBJECTION BASED ON A CLAIM OF ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE. NO ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS SHALL BE IMPOSED BEYOND THAT IMPOSED ABOVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ROBERTO BARRERA RAMOS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES SET NO. ONE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE HER RESPONSES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THIS ORDER WITHOUT OBJECTION EXCEPT FOR AN ASSERTION, IF APPROPRIATE, OF ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE. NO ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED OTHER THAN SET FORTH ABOVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT
